description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing system packages with apt-get. The pipeline uses the default Docker image (no explicit image) and has a single job named build in the default test stage. In the before_script execute "apt-get update", then "apt-get -y install zsh" and "apt-get -y install tmux". The build job runs the command "bash install.sh" and has no caches, artifacts, or special rules or deployment targets.
